<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 67072 => 'Timor Telecom', 67073 => 'Telkomcel', 67074 => 'Telkomcel', 67075 => 'Viettel (Telemor brand)', 67076 => 'Viettel (Telemor brand)', 67077 => 'Timor Telecom', 67078 => 'Timor Telecom', ];
